user.title: Set up reQnet Recuperator
user.description: Enter the recuperator's IP address and your MQTT broker credentials. The integration will automatically configure the device and discover its MAC address.

data_description.mqtt_broker: Usually the IP address of your Home Assistant server

discover_mac.title: Discovering device…
discover_mac.description: Waiting for the recuperator to connect to the MQTT broker. This may take up to 30 seconds.

confirm.title: Device found!
confirm.description:
Recuperator detected with MAC address **{mac}**.

Click **Submit** to complete setup.

manual_mac.title: Enter MAC address manually
manual_mac.description:
No MQTT message received within {timeout}s from broker {broker}:{port}.

Ensure the recuperator can reach the broker, then enter its MAC address (found on the device label or in the reQnet app).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the recuperator. Check IP address and network.
error.broker_config_failed: Failed to send MQTT broker configuration to the device. Check HA logs.
error.invalid_mac: Invalid MAC address format. Use: XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX
